title: Peepo Hotbar
body:
Have you been missing a little frog in the hotbar for a long time?
Now a cute Peepo is sitting in your hotbar <3
![hotbar view](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/61474b667ca607475f8aa9c3a780e345017aba08.png)
